calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-24-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bonnie Landles-Dowling for (Petitioner) Nadine Boffi.

Ms. Landles-Dowling reported that she has filed a waiver of notice of Laura Marino-Nuno, that everyone is in agreement, that there is a reverse mortgage, that Ms. Marino-Nuno is not joining in the amended petition but will not object to it, that they would like to have bond, that they do not want court supervision and that the two sisters will work together. The Court stated that it is hoping to move forward and will need a signature of verification by Ms. Marino-Nuno on the petition. Ms. Landles-Dowling stated that Ms. Marino-Nuno tried to object to the first petition which is why they amended it but that she is not objecting to the current amended petition. The Court stated that it will need something in writing regarding Ms. Marino-Nuno not objecting to the petition and then the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary will be under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Robles. (Not Reported)
